articles.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
articles.summary: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, according to US media.

articles.title: She was told to marry in a country which bans girls' education. So she got in a taxi and fled
articles.summary: Nearly five years on from the school ban, young women say they have waved goodbye to their dreams.

articles.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
articles.summary: A hypersonic missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

articles.title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
articles.summary: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.

articles.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
articles.summary: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.

articles.title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
articles.summary: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

articles.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
articles.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

articles.title: Ebola outbreak poses massive challenges, warns nurse
articles.summary: Kate White says she is "extremely concerned about the inability to get resources" to the Democratic Republic of Congo.

articles.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
articles.summary: The 39-year-old was fatally injured at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland, apparently while spearfishing.

articles.title: One killed and many feared trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
articles.summary: A Malaysian man has died and about 20 people are feared trapped at the site near Manila, officials say.
